results.name: ICAC Investigators 2024
results.overview: In a high-stakes corruption case, ICAC Principal Investigator Kong Kin-chau edges closer to the truth within a listed company. Chief Investigator Szeto Kai-man and Assistant Investigator Ting Sum go undercover as a father-daughter duo to gather evidence against a construction firm, while Firearms Team member Chui Ho-nam and Assistant Investigator Chung Hau-ling help secure crucial intel. Meanwhile, Senior Investigator Ng Hok-bun exposes corruption within the prison system. Despite differing views and setbacks, the team remains steadfast in pursuing justice in the secondary school engineering scandal.

results.name: School Rangers 2024
results.original_name: รถโรงเรียน School Rangers 2024
results.overview: The Rangers are made up of 16 GMMTV artists whose appearances rotate. Often joined by celebrity guests, they separate into teams to compete in themed games.

results.name: The Voice Thailand 2024
results.original_name: เดอะวอยซ์ไทยแลนด์ เสียงจริง ตัวจริง ฤดูกาลที่ 9
results.overview: The Voice is a reality television series that features four coaches looking for a talented new artist, who could become a global superstar. The show's concept is indicated by its title: the coaches do not judge the artists by their looks, personalities, stage presence, or dance routines, only their vocal ability. It is this aspect that differentiates The Voice from other reality television series such as The X Factor, Britain's Got Talent or even Must Be the Music. In the Blind auditions, the competitors are split into four teams, which are mentored by the coaches. If a coach likes what they hear, a button-press allows their chair to spin around and face the performer, signifying that they would like to mentor them. If more than one does so, then the artist selects a coach. However, if no coach turns around then the artist is sent home. There are five different stages: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battles, knockouts, and live shows.

results.original_title: 世にも奇妙な物語 '24夏の特別編
results.overview: "Tales of the Bizarre: 2024 Summer Special" (世にも奇妙な物語 '24夏の特別編) aired on Fuji TV on June 8, 2024, featuring four intriguing stories:  1. "The Mansion of Remembrance"  A woman awakens in a mysterious mansion after an accident, encountering residents with fragmented memories. 2. "Tomobiki Village"  A university student visits a secluded village for a friend's funeral, uncovering eerie traditions and hidden truths. 3. "Treasure of Humanity"  An artist is recruited by a global organization to preserve cultural heritage, leading to unexpected revelations about his talent. 4. "Weekly Ex-Lover Creation"  A woman assembles an android replica of her ex-boyfriend using a magazine kit, blurring the lines between reality and artificiality.
results.title: Tales of the Bizarre: 2024 Summer Special

results.name: Rafta Rafta (2024)
results.overview: Get ready for a wild experience of fun, love, hate, and uproarious antics! Join us as we jump into the chaotic world of a couple whose relationship swings between passion and frustration faster than you can say 'I love you...I hate you!' With laughter as their constant companion, Get ready four new drama that promises to deliver non-stop fun along with the ups and downs of love.
The short shows several moments from the year 2024, being told through records with recordings and photos taken by the director, showing his friends and several moments that marked his year.
results.title: Happiness, 2024

results.overview: Vienna Philharmonic’s annual Summer Night Concert takes place in the unique setting of the spectacular Schönbrunn Palace Gardens in Vienna. This year’s concert focuses on popular works from the 19th and 20th centuries that highlight Europe's rich musical heritage. Norwegian opera singer and recitalist Lise Davidsen performs arias from Richard Wagner's Tannhäuser and Giuseppe Verdi's La forza del destino. The prominent Czech composer Bedrich Smetana is also celebrated in his bicentennial year. Maestro Andris Nelsons returns to conduct the orchestra for the second time.
results.title: Summer Night Concert 2024

results.name: Lovesick (2024)
results.overview: The love story between Dr. Amalia Levy, a renowned breast cancer surgeon, and her patient, Micah Haddad, a promising young politician, starts when the two of them discover, on the very same day, that they have cancer. Breast cancer. Not quite love at first sight — more like love at first lump. As they each grapple with the aftermath of the diagnosis and treatment, and its impact on their professional lives and family dynamics, they find solace in their shared poignant moments and realize that the worst thing that ever happened to them is also the best thing to happen to them.

results.original_title: 世にも奇妙な物語'24 冬の特別編
results.title: Tales of the Bizarre: 2024 Winter Special

results.overview: A man and woman, now living apart, reunite after a long time. They sit on a bench in the shade of the trees and talk. The man speaks in a tone like he's talking to himself, about strange dreams he's been having often lately. "In some of them, I'm an animal,  a plant, a tree, and a human." Even though it's a dream, it feels vividly real, as if he's become that thing. “Yeah, that's what it is... a previous life.”
results.title: Yorushika LIVE 2024 [ZENSE]

results.overview: Serial murder examines how seemingly rational choices can perpetuate inequality, challenging viewers to reconsider workplace structures and their societal implications. The Footprints of the Invisible Man Walking on the Sand explores diverse mourning processes, documenting memories, testimonies, and funerals of those for whom death is as close as life. Chores of one's own revisits a construction site 31 years later, exploring the impact of a young worker's death.
results.title: Witnesses 2024

results.overview: Direct report of the arrival of Sinterklaas, this year in municipality Vijfheerenlanden.
results.title: Sinterklaas Procession 2024

results.original_title: PICU 小児集中治療室 スペシャル2024
results.overview: In this special drama, Takeshiro is portrayed on the stage of Okadama Hospital a year after he was assigned to PICU. Takeshiro came to see the guidance of two residents who came in the late clinical training. I would like to show my senior appearance, but the two residents made fun of Takeshiro, who was unreliable and said, "You don't have to force yourself to say good things. I want to learn from Mr. Ueno," and he takes a blunt attitude.
results.title: PICU: Pediatric Intensive Care Unit Special 2024

results.overview: The Bomb is a story of two Indian detective Who is investigating a Pakistani terrorist who has planted time bombs in the big city of India, and they torturing him to know where does he planted these bombs.
results.title: The Bomb 2024

results.name: America 2024: Clan Warfare
results.overview: As the presidential election approaches, this four-part documentary journeys deep into the divided nation of America. What do ordinary Americans in 2024 think of the polarised debate in the USA?

results.name: LIVE STAGE Bocchi the Rock! 2024
results.original_name: LIVE STAGE「ぼっち・ざ・ろっく！」2024 PART I STARRY / PART II 秀華祭
results.overview: LIVE STAGE "Bocchi za Rokku!" 2024  is the 2024 edition of the stage play series based on the manga and anime series Bocchi the Rock!. It is performed in THEATER MILANO-Za, Kabukicho, Shinjuku, Tokyo on September 7 until September 24, 2024.
